title: Best International ETFs 2026: Top Foreign Funds Ranked
description: Compare top international ETFs like VXUS, VEA, and VWO. Ranked by returns, expense ratio, and region to find the best foreign stock fund for 2026.

mainEntity.name: What is the best international ETF for 2026?

acceptedAnswer.text: The best international ETF depends on your specific goals, but Vanguard Total International Stock ETF (VXUS) and iShares Core MSCI Total International Stock ETF (IXUS) are popular choices for broad, low-cost exposure.

mainEntity.name: What is the difference between VXUS and VEA?

acceptedAnswer.text: VXUS covers the total international stock market, including emerging markets, while VEA focuses specifically on developed markets outside North America and excludes emerging markets.

mainEntity.name: Which is the best emerging market ETF?

acceptedAnswer.text: Vanguard Emerging Markets Stock Index Fund (VWO) and iShares Core MSCI Emerging Markets ETF (IEMG) are two of the largest and most widely used ETFs for emerging market exposure.

mainEntity.name: Should I invest in international ETFs?

acceptedAnswer.text: Many experts recommend international ETFs for diversification, as they can reduce overall portfolio risk and capture growth in global markets that may outperform domestic markets during certain periods.
Yes, many international ETFs pay dividends. Historically, international stocks often have higher dividend yields than U.S. stocks, making them attractive for income-focused investors.
